name: Cleanup temp files
message: Delete files older than 24 hours from /tmp/zbot-* and ~/zbot/wards/scratch/. Be conservative — only touch these paths, skip anything that doesn't look ephemeral, and report counts and total size at the end.

name: Ward curator weekly cleanup
message: Run `curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:${ZBOT_API_PORT:-8080}/api/curator/cleanup -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}'` and report the transitions, scanned/skipped counts, backup_path, and report_path from the JSON response. Surface any errors verbatim.
